overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi action game showing a character entering a small industrial storage room and systematically searching containers for supplies. The scene features metallic interiors with artificial lighting and a methodical looting sequence in a compact warehouse space.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact industrial storage room with metal crates

events.description: character enters from dark exterior into the illuminated storage room through the metallic doorway

agents.ego_description: crouching and moving through the doorway into the small storage room, approaching the central crates

entered.detail: large industrial door frame with rounded edges leading into the storage room
tall gray metal container with reinforced edges in the center of the room
rectangular supply box with yellow coloring and red markings
low metal rack with multiple compartments near the back wall
wall-mounted interface with glowing buttons next to the door

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small, dimly lit industrial storage room through a metallic doorway. The space contains several large crates including a distinctive yellow supply crate, with metal shelving visible in the back corner. The camera follows closely as the character begins systematically searching the containers.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room left side with weapon rack

events.description: character interacts with the metal shelving unit, retrieving items from the compartments

agents.ego_description: crouching beside the metal shelving unit and searching through its compartments for supplies

entered.detail: long metal table surface near the entrance door with items on top

segments.scene_description: The character moves to the left side of the room to search a metal shelving unit containing various supplies. The camera pans to follow the movement, revealing a metal counter near the entrance door while the yellow crate moves out of view behind the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room center with exit door visible

events.description: character searches the metal counter near the door, collecting remaining items

agents.ego_description: checking the final containers near the exit door and the large central crate, completing the looting sequence

segments.scene_description: The character finishes searching the room by checking the metal counter near the exit and returning to the large central crate. The doorway becomes prominent again as the character completes the systematic looting of the small storage space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial storage room as a character systematically loots the available supplies. It begins as the character enters through a metallic doorway, moving toward several large containers and a distinctive yellow supply crate. As the character shifts to the left, the camera pans to follow them toward a metal shelving unit, causing the yellow crate to slide out of view while revealing a metal counter near the entrance. The scene then pivots back toward the center of the room as the character checks the counter before returning to the large central crate. Finally, the camera pulls back to make the doorway prominent once more as the systematic search of the compact warehouse space concludes.
